The cultural write-ups, phrase lessons, quizzes and interface design on this site are the property of TuneHop. All rights reserved.
This site exists for cultural and language education. All songs and music videos remain the property of their rights holders (songwriters, performers and labels); videos play exclusively through the official YouTube embedded player, and this site does not store, reproduce or offer downloads of any music files.
Lyric excerpts appear only as brief quotations for commentary and teaching; artist, band and song names are used factually with no claim of rights.
If you find an error, or you are a rights holder with concerns about how content is used here, please email Leon@huangleon.com and we will promptly correct or remove it.
